title: Different payment methods
description: Practice comparing payment methods: cash/debit, credit card, in-store financing, rent-to-own, and layaway.

assessment_items.question_content:
When it comes to paying for an item, there are many payment methods available.

One payment method involves paying for an item in installments over time, with the understanding that you won't receive the item until it's paid in full.

**Which term describes this payment method?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

When it comes to paying for an item, there are many payment methods available.

One payment method involves borrowing money from a lender in order to make a purchase, with the intention of paying the lender back over time, usually with interest.

**Which term describes this payment method?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

When it comes to paying for an item, there are many payment methods available.

One payment method involves paying for an item in full upfront, without needing to borrow money or make payments over time.

**Which term describes this payment method?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Listed below are different payment methods people use to pay for items.  

**Which of the following methods typically involve paying interest?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Listed below are different payment methods people use to pay for items.  

**Which of the following methods typically involves paying for a purchase over time?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Listed below are different payment methods people use to pay for items.  

**Which of the following payment methods allow you to receive the item immediately, but pay for it over time?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Listed below are four methods of paying for a printer with an initial cost of $\$82$.

Method | Terms | Total
- | - | -
**Cash** | None | $\$82$
**Credit card** | $22.99\%$ APR, $28$ days grace period | $\$82 +{}$  interest
**In-store financing** | $3$ months interest-free | $\$82$
**Layaway** | $\$5$ set up fee, equal monthly payments | $\$?$

**What would be the total cost if choosing *layaway* as a payment method?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Listed below are four methods of paying for a tablet with an initial cost of $\$74$.

Method | Terms | Total
- | - | -
**Cash** | None | $\$74$
**Credit card** | $16.99\%$ APR, $29$ days grace period | $\$?$ 
**In-store financing** | $3$ months interest-free | $\$74$
**Layaway** | $\$5$ set up fee, equal monthly payments | $\$79$

**What would be the total cost if choosing *credit card* as a payment method, given that the purchase is not paid off within the grace period?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Listed below are four methods of paying for a polaroid camera with an initial cost of $\$54$.

Method | Terms | Total
- | - | -
**Cash** | None | $\$54$
**Credit card** | $16.99\%$ APR, $29$ days grace period | $\$54 +{}$ interest 
**In-store financing** | $3$ months interest-free | $\$?$
**Layaway** | $\$4$ set up fee, equal monthly payments | $\$58$

**What would be the total cost if choosing *in-store financing* as a payment method, given that the purchase was paid off within $3$ months?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Mina is currently at a store looking to buy a bicycle for $\$62$. 

* Mina has $\$40$ in cash.
* She gets paid at the end of the week.
* She wants to buy the bicycle today.
* She does not want to return to the store.

Listed below are different methods of paying for the bicycle.

Method | Terms | Total
- | - | -
**Cash** | None | $\$62$
**Credit card** | $19.99\%$ APR, $28$ days grace period | $\$62 +{}$  interest 
**Layaway** | $\$8$ set up fee, equal payments | $\$70$

**Based on the information given, which payment method works best for Mina? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

Louie is currently at a store looking to buy a grill for $\$89$. 

* Louie has $\$20$ in cash.
* He gets paid weekly and would like to make small payments each week.
* He wants to ensure he gets the grill of his choice before it sells out.
* He does not need the grill till the summer ($6$ months from the purchase).

Listed below are different methods of paying for the grill.

Method | Terms | Total
- | - | -
**Cash** | None | $\$89$
**Credit card** | $29.99\%$ APR, $\$25$ minimum monthly payment | $\$89 +{}$  interest 
**Layaway** | $\$4$ set up fee, $\$5$ payment minimum | $\$93$

**Based on the information given, which payment method works best for Louie? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

Pedro is currently at a store looking to buy a cell phone for $\$59$. 

* Pedro has $\$80$ in cash.
* He needs the phone immediately.
* He can make monthly payments on it, if needed.

Listed below are different methods of paying for the phone.

Method | Terms | Total
- | - | -
**Cash** | None | $\$59$
**Credit card** | $22.99\%$ APR, $\$25$ minimum monthly payment | $\$59 +{}$  interest 
**Layaway** | $\$8$ set up fee, $\$5$ payment minimum | $\$67$

**Based on the information given, which payment method works best for Pedro? **

[[☃ radio 1]]
